user.title: User Profile
user.description: Represents a retro MSN profile stored in Firestore.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

name.description: The custom status pseudonym or MSN display name of the user.

email.description: The Hotmail or live.nl email of the user.

avatar.description: The MSN display picture (emoji or character).

status.description: The current retro MSN status of the user.

personalMessage.description: The subtext MSN personal note (e.g., [ Now listening to: Linkin Park ]).

listeningTo.description: Optional MSN song or MP3 player description currently playing.

message.title: Chat Message
message.description: Represents an individual message, nudge, or wink within MSN.

senderId.description: The UID of the sending user.

senderName.description: The MSN display name of the sender at the moment of transport.

senderAvatar.description: The avatar of the sending user.

isBuzz.description: Determines if this event is an MSN Nudge.

isWink.description: Determines if this event is a fullscreen Wink.

winkId.description: Which Wink graphic to display (e.g. pig, crazy).

receiverId.description: Target ID. Can be channel ID like 'mensen-van-toen' or user ID for DM.

createdAt.description: Server-side transaction timestamp used for chronological sorting.

/users/{userId}.description: The document referencing each individual's profile.

/messages/{messageId}.description: The document store representing all messages shared across groups and direct dialogues.
